presets.name: FLUX — Golden Hour Portrait
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: elderly fisherman with weathered face] [Environment: wooden dock at sunrise] [Camera: 85mm f/1.4, eye-level] [Lighting: golden hour backlight, warm rim on skin] [Style: documentary portrait, Kodak Portra 400 film grain] [Mood: contemplative, timeless] [Exclude: modern buildings, tourists]

presets.name: MAI 2 — Fashion Editorial
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: model in deconstructed denim jacket with raw edges] [Environment: industrial warehouse with exposed brick] [Action: leaning against steel beam, looking away] [Lighting: single hard light source, deep shadows] [Camera: medium format, 50mm equivalent] [Style: high fashion editorial, muted earth tones] [Exclude: colorful backgrounds, smiling]

presets.name: Gemini Nano — Food Photography
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: artisan sourdough bread with butter melting] [Environment: rustic wooden table, linen napkin] [Camera: 50mm f/2.8, 45-degree angle] [Lighting: natural window light, soft shadows] [Style: food photography, warm tones, shallow depth of field] [Mood: cozy, homemade] [Exclude: plastic, artificial props]

presets.name: Meta AI — Travel Snapshot
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: colorful street market in Marrakech] [Environment: narrow alley with hanging lanterns] [Style: vibrant travel photography, high saturation] [Mood: lively, exotic] [Exclude: tourists, modern signs]

presets.name: GPT Image 2 — Corporate Headshot
presets.basePrompt: [Subject: professional woman in navy blazer] [Environment: clean gray backdrop] [Camera: 85mm, head-and-shoulders] [Lighting: butterfly lighting, soft fill] [Style: corporate headshot, neutral, confident] [Constraints: No jewelry distractions, neutral expression, shoulders squared] [Use case: LinkedIn profile]
